texto: Fish held the silence for so long that I had to restrain myself from prodding her. That's never a good idea. Sometimes people hesitate because they don't have the courage to come out with whatever needs to be said
autor: other times they desperately want to speak but can't find the words. Jabbing them prematurely tends to shut them up. Outwaiting them gives them the time to say more than they intend.
explicacao: Citação de other times they desperately want to speak but can't find the words. Jabbing them prematurely tends to shut them up. Outwaiting them gives them the time to say more than they intend. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Fish held the silence for so long that I had to restrain myself from prodding her. That's never a…” articula coragem, adam-troy-castro, emissaries-from-the-dead em registro de coragem, com relevância para contextos como reflexao-noturna e dia-chuvoso.
